checks.name: State Independence
checks.notes: Skill is fully stateless. Context preserved through physical artifacts (LEGACY_ANALYSIS.md, MODERNIZATION_PLAN.md, REFACTOR_LOG.md, VALIDATION_REPORT.md).

checks.name: Artifact Gating
checks.notes: Every transition requires the preceding artifact. SCOUT → STRATEGIZE gated on LEGACY_ANALYSIS.md. STRATEGIZE → REFACTOR gated on MODERNIZATION_PLAN.md.

checks.name: Intent Preservation
checks.notes: Mandatory 'context' in LEGACY_ANALYSIS.md and 'tradeoffs_rejected' in MODERNIZATION_PLAN.md enforce lossless intent handoff.

checks.name: Loop Breakers
checks.notes: max_retries: 3 in YAML frontmatter. Explicit Wait-For-Human fallback from REFACTOR state.

checks.name: Physical Execution Standards
checks.notes: VALIDATE relies on Exit Code 0 from test suites, not subjective assessment.

checks.name: Single-File Format
checks.notes: YAML frontmatter combined with Markdown body in SKILL.md.

checks.name: Composite Personas
checks.notes: Clearly defined: Archaeologist (Scout), Strategist, Artisan (Refactor), Verifier, Senior Reviewer (Critic), Collaborator (HITL).

checks.name: Graceful Degradation
checks.notes: Explicit tool requirements in YAML frontmatter. HITL fallback for unresolvable failures.

checks.name: Separation of Concerns
checks.notes: YAML handles routing logic; Markdown handles cognitive instructions.

checks.name: Agent Agnosticism
checks.notes: No reliance on specific LLM features. Strictly defined by tool requirements and filesystem state.
